question: q1_spending
prompt: What is our true monthly spending — excluding transfers between our own accounts and credit-card payments?
transcript:
```chart
{"chartType":"bar","title":"True Monthly Spending — April to June 2026","labels":["April","May","June"],"datasets":[{"label":"Direct checking expenses","data":[4586.02,4593.43,4725.49],"backgroundColor":"#547D8C"},{"label":"Credit-card purchases (net of refunds)","data":[1001.49,666.24,1577.8],"backgroundColor":"#8CB9A8"}],"xAxisLabel":null,"yAxisLabel":"Monthly spending","stacked":true,"numberFormat":null,"annotations":null,"horizontal":false,"colors":["#547D8C","#8CB9A8"],"currency":"USD","totals":null}
```

Your **true monthly spending is $5,716.82**, averaged across the **three complete months available: April–June 2026**. This excludes transfers between your accounts and credit-card payments, while counting the underlying card purchases once.

> *June was highest at $6,303.29; the three-month total was $17,150.47.*

| Month | Direct expenses | Card purchases | True spending |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| April | $4,586.02 | $1,001.49 | **$5,587.51** |
| May | $4,593.43 | $666.24 | **$5,259.67** |
| June | $4,725.49 | $1,577.80 | **$6,303.29** |
| **Average** | **$4,634.98** | **$1,081.84** | **$5,716.82** |

April includes a **$3,850 property-tax payment**. If that is an annual rather than monthly expense, your recurring-style baseline is **$4,433.49 per month**—but the more realistic annualized budget would add one-twelfth of that tax bill, producing about **$4,754.32 per month**.

One data limitation: the transaction feeds returned only three overlapping months, and checking history was capped at 50 entries, so early-April expenses may be incomplete. The estimate may therefore be slightly understated.
